my blog

thanks for checking out my blog! i like to write about anything that comes to mind!

you’re only shown a snippet of the post, so make sure to click on the post if you want to read the whole thing!

  • youraislopboresme is actually really cool!

    09 Mar 2026

    hi chat. another global trend has hit the social media.
    it's youraislopbores.me! a cute website where you can pretend to be an AI while responding to other user's prompts!

    i've absolutely fallen in love with it. there's something so freeing and nice about asking a complete stranger "should i go kiss my girlfriend yuri style" and then getting a response that says "Yes and invite me too?". amazing.
    ... click to read more!

  • happy pokemon day 2026!

    27 Feb 2026

    HAPPY POKEMON DAY !!!! this is gonna be a super short post as it's been like 40*C all day and i am too hot to think... but first of all, i drew something small to celebrate the day! it's my pokemon trainer sona, sage, holding their partner shortcake! i freaking love espurr man. its such a funny pokemon. when i eventually get around to it, i'm going to make a directory of all my plushies! that includes my espurr plushies too. Plural
    ... click to read more!

  • how (and why) you should make a website!

    19 Feb 2026

    hi! first and foremost, this guide is mainly aimed at my friend group as i hopelessly convince them with big wet sad eyes to make a funny little website . so if you're not from my Years Old Tight Knit Close Friend Group then this guide is probably not very helpful... you can read it anyway if you want tho...
